title: Os Bandeirantes
writer: Rubem Braga, Marcel Camus, Louis Sapin
actors: Raymond Loyer, Elga Andersen, Lourdes de Oliveira
plot: In Brazil, a diamond digger sets off in pursuit of a thief who robbed him after leaving him for dead. Along the way, he meets a former mistress of his adversary and tries to extract some information about the individual.
